parts.text: I am from a health-tech company. Our hospital operations are getting bogged down. Specifically, I want to use an AI agent to optimize our internal IT support ticketing process, which currently takes days to resolve.
I run a retail chain. I just want to apply agents to my company to help with customers. Can you help?
I am in the financial services sector. I want to optimize the internal process of handling employee expense reports. Currently, it's very manual. People submit receipts and finance reviews them.
